1.content:
## 🤖 Automation Intelligence Center
**Problem → Workflow correlation · Remediation health · Root cause recurrence · MTTR analysis**
*Detect where automation is masking root causes instead of fixing them*

2.title: 🔴 Active Problems
2.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) and event.status == "ACTIVE" | summarize active_problems = count()

3.title: ⛔ Availability Issues
3.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) and event.status == "ACTIVE" and event.category == "AVAILABILITY" | summarize count = count()

4.title: 🚨 Error Rate Problems
4.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) and event.status == "ACTIVE" and event.category == "ERROR" | summarize count = count()

5.title: ⚠️ Resource Contention
5.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) and event.status == "ACTIVE" and event.category == "RESOURCE_CONTENTION" | summarize count = count()

6.title: ✅ Closed (Resolved)
6.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) and event.status == "CLOSED" | summarize resolved = count()

8.title: Active Problems by Category
8.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) and event.status == "ACTIVE" | summarize count(), by: {event.category} | sort `count()` desc

9.title: Problem Activity Over Time — by Category
9.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) | makeTimeseries active = countIf(event.status == "ACTIVE"), closed = countIf(event.status == "CLOSED"), interval: 30m, by: {event.category}

11.title: Recent Problems — Status, Root Cause & Blast Radius
11.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) | fields display_id, event.name, event.category, event.status, event.start, root_cause_entity_name, affected_count = arraySize(smartscape.affected_entity.ids) | sort event.start desc | limit 25

12.title: Problems per Entity Type (Active)
12.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) and event.status == "ACTIVE" | filter isNotNull(smartscape.affected_entity.types) | fieldsAdd entity_type = arrayToString(smartscape.affected_entity.types, delimiter: ",") | summarize total = count(), avg_blast_radius = avg(arraySize(smartscape.affected_entity.ids)), by: {entity_type} | sort total desc | limit 10

14.title: Known Root Causes — Recurrence & Active Status
14.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) | filter isNotNull(root_cause_entity_name) | summarize total_problems = count(), active_now = countIf(event.status == "ACTIVE"), last_seen = max(event.start), by: {root_cause_entity_name} | sort total_problems desc | limit 15

15.title: Avg Time to Resolve — by Problem Category (minutes)
15.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) | fieldsAdd duration_min = (coalesce(event.end, now()) - event.start) / 1000000000 / 60 | summarize mttr_min = avg(duration_min), by: {event.category} | sort mttr_min desc

17.title: Workflow Executions — Pass / Fail Summary
17.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.provider == "workflows" | summarize executions = count(), passed = countIf(test.result == "pass"), failed = countIf(test.result == "fail"), by: {event.type} | sort executions desc

18.title: Anomaly Signal Volume Over Time — Kubernetes & Metric Events
18.query: fetch events | filter event.provider == "METRIC_EVENTS" or event.provider == "KUBERNETES_ANOMALY_DETECTION" | makeTimeseries count = count(), interval: 30m, by: {event.type}

20.title: Problems Recurring by Name — Potential Unresolved Root Causes
20.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) | summarize occurrences = count(), active_now = countIf(event.status == "ACTIVE"), first_seen = min(event.start), last_seen = max(event.start), by: {event.name} | filter occurrences > 1 | sort occurrences desc | limit 20

21.title: Problem Resolution Rate Over Time
21.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) | makeTimeseries active = countIf(event.status == "ACTIVE"), resolved = countIf(event.status == "CLOSED"), interval: 30m

23.title: CI/CD Events — GitHub & Azure DevOps
23.query: fetch events | filter event.provider == "github.com" or event.provider == "azure.devops" | summarize deployments = count(), by: {event.provider, event.type} | sort deployments desc | limit 15

24.title: Slowdown Problems — Response Time Degradations
24.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) and event.category == "SLOWDOWN" | fields display_id, event.name, event.status, event.start, root_cause_entity_name, affected_count = arraySize(smartscape.affected_entity.ids) | sort event.start desc | limit 15
